Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Continued To Mar-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person.

The matter was continued to March 1, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court will issue a notice to appear to Attorney Jon Vaught and Executor Bruce Friend to appear on that date to explain status of the final distribution.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy B. Bloom.
